package handler

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for health_or_readiness_handlers_reach_into_business_repositories_directly: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Health endpoints that depend on full business repositories instead of focused probes.
type CaseHealthOrReadinessHandlersReachIntoBusinessRepositoriesDirectlyDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseHealthOrReadinessHandlersReachIntoBusinessRepositoriesDirectlyModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseHealthOrReadinessHandlersReachIntoBusinessRepositoriesDirectlyRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseHealthOrReadinessHandlersReachIntoBusinessRepositoriesDirectlyModel
}

type CaseHealthOrReadinessHandlersReachIntoBusinessRepositoriesDirectlyService struct {
    repo *CaseHealthOrReadinessHandlersReachIntoBusinessRepositoriesDirectlyRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseHealthOrReadinessHandlersReachIntoBusinessRepositoriesDirectlyAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveHealthOrReadinessHandlersReachIntoBusinessRepositoriesDirectly(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseHealthOrReadinessHandlersReachIntoBusinessRepositoriesDirectlyDTO) error {
    focus := "health_or_readiness_handlers_reach"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    var request CaseHealthOrReadinessHandlersReachIntoBusinessRepositoriesDirectlyDTO
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&request)
    request.TenantID = c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID")
    c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": input, "tenant": request.TenantID})
    service := &CaseHealthOrReadinessHandlersReachIntoBusinessRepositoriesDirectlyService{repo: &CaseHealthOrReadinessHandlersReachIntoBusinessRepositoriesDirectlyRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseHealthOrReadinessHandlersReachIntoBusinessRepositoriesDirectlyModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    health_readiness_handlers_reach_business_positive := map[string]int{"health": 1, "readiness": 2, "handlers": 3, "reach": 4, "business": 5, "repositories": 6}
    health_readiness_handlers_reach_business_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    health_positive_0 := health_readiness_handlers_reach_business_positive["health"] + len(input)
    _ = health_positive_0
    readiness_positive_1 := health_readiness_handlers_reach_business_positive["readiness"] + len(input)
    _ = readiness_positive_1
    handlers_positive_2 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = handlers_positive_2
    reach_positive_3 := health_readiness_handlers_reach_business_positive["reach"] + len(input)
    _ = reach_positive_3
    business_positive_4 := CaseHealthOrReadinessHandlersReachIntoBusinessRepositoriesDirectlyDTO{ID: input, Status: "business"}
    _ = business_positive_4
    repositories_positive_5 := db.Where("repositories_id = ?", input)
    _ = repositories_positive_5
    return nil
}
